original_description: Copilot CLI sub-agent system for persona-based analysis. Use when piping large contexts to GitHub Copilot models for security audits, architecture reviews, QA analysis, or any specialized analysis requiring a fresh model context.
best_description: Copilot CLI sub-agent system for persona-based analysis. Use when piping large contexts to GitHub Copilot models for security audits, architecture reviews, QA analysis, or any specialized analysis requiring a fresh model context.
final_description: Use this skill for dispatching Copilot CLI sub-agents (persona-based) to run isolated, non‑interactive, file-piped analyses on large contexts—e.g., security audits/red-team, architecture reviews, deep QA, or scripted persona chains that must run in a fresh model context. Prefer when you need deterministic, severity-tagged findings or automated CLI runs; not for casual Q&A.

history.description: Copilot CLI sub-agent system for persona-based analysis. Use when piping large contexts to GitHub Copilot models for security audits, architecture reviews, QA analysis, or any specialized analysis requiring a fresh model context.

train_results.query: Run a security audit by delegating to a Copilot CLI sub-agent persona.
What is the weather in Oslo today?

test_results.query: Use Copilot CLI with a persona prompt to review architecture findings.
Explain binary search in simple terms.

results.query: Run a security audit by delegating to a Copilot CLI sub-agent persona.
